SLO WIC Locations
SLO WIC Locations
Location, directions and hours of operation
Click on location name to show hours of operation, directions and phone information
▾
Atascadero
Monday - Thursday 8:00 - 5:30 PM and Friday 8:00 - 4:30 PM
Please note all County of SLO WIC clinics are closed the last Wednesday of the month
5575 Hospital Drive
Atascadero, CA 93422
WIC Clinic: (805) 237-3065
Alternate Tel: (805) 781-5570
▾
Grover Beach
Monday - Thursday 8:00 AM - 5:30 PM and Friday 8:00 - 4:30 PM (closed for lunch 12:30-1 PM Friday only)
Clinic closed the last Wednesday of the month
286 South 16th Street, Suite B
Grover Beach, CA 93433
Tel: (805) 473-7130
▾
Paso Robles
Monday - Thursday 8:00 am - 5:30 pm
~ Friday 8:00 - 4:30 pm
805 4th Street
Paso Robles, CA 93446
Tel: (805) 237-3065
▾
San Luis Obispo
Monday, Tuesday, Thursday 8:00 - 5:30 PM, Wednesday 8:00 - 5:00 PM and Friday 8:00 - 4:30 PM
2191 Johnson Avenue
San Luis Obispo, CA 93401
Tel: (805) 781-5570
Please note
:
All WIC locations have limited hours the last Wednesday of every month.
The Cambria, Morro Bay, and Nipomo WIC clinics
permanently closed
on July 1, 2025, due to budget cuts. But WIC services are not going away — we’re still here for you!

at 1180 Kendall Road, San Luis Obispo
